creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi, Paul! 

I've discussed the question you raised with security/heimdal maintainer, as 
well as with few other portes. Although the problem you raised is serious 
and well recognised by all the parities there isn't any good solution to 
it within current ports infrustructure. 

From the Samba side, I can't guaranty the proper order of the header 
include paths - it's a long standing problem of Samba and it's developers 
still can't address it(or don't recognise it as a serious). 

From Heimdal port owner point it seems not always feaseable to set extra 
variables in the make.conf, as there is software, that may need system 
version of Kerberos. 

From my side I see that having something like bsd.krb5.mk with proper 
knobs may ease the situation, but no one yet volonteered to write on. 

So, at that point I can't really fix your problem. 

With best regards, 
Timur.
